tool_args.label: Metro-North Railroad Procurements - February 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North Railroad Procurements - February 2025. The Procurement Agenda this month includes 2 actions for a proposed estimated expenditure of $304.9M.

payload.title: Metro-North Railroad Procurements
payload.description: February 2025 Metro-North procurement agenda with 2 actions for $304.9M, including a coach car RFP for Penn Station Access and a dual-mode locomotive option exercise with Siemens.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Railroad
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North Railroad - mentioned throughout as the railroad requesting procurement approvals.

payload.description: Metro-North Commuter Railroad, the MTA commuter rail agency serving New York and Connecticut.

tool_args.label: Amtrak
tool_args.raw_text: Amtrak - providing territory for Penn Station Access service and providing key operational requirements.

tool_args.label: Connecticut Department of Transportation
tool_args.raw_text: Connecticut Department of Transportation (CTDOT) - worked with Metro-North on locomotive options and provides service requirements for PSA region.

tool_args.label: Long Island Rail Road (LIRR)
tool_args.raw_text: Long Island Rail Road (LIRR) - received approval for alternate configuration dual-mode locomotives under Option 3.

tool_args.label: Siemens Mobility, Inc.
tool_args.raw_text: Siemens Mobility, Inc. (Sacramento, California) - Contract #244941 for design, manufacture, test, and delivery of new Dual-Mode Locomotives.

tool_args.label: MTA Procurement Department
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Procurement Department - Department Head: Lisette Camilo. Project Manager: Rose Davis.

tool_args.label: Omar Messado
tool_args.raw_text: Omar Messado, Assistant Deputy Chief Procurement Officer – MTA Office of the Chief Procurement Officer.

payload.title: Assistant Deputy Chief Procurement Officer – MTA Office of the Chief Procurement Officer

tool_args.label: Lisette Camilo
tool_args.raw_text: Department Head Name: Lisette Camilo - MTA Procurement Department Head.

tool_args.label: Rose Davis
tool_args.raw_text: Project Manager Name: Rose Davis - MTA Procurement.

tool_args.label: Penn Station Access (PSA)
tool_args.raw_text: Penn Station Access (PSA) - new route providing service from Penn Station to four new Bronx commuter railroad stations via Amtrak's territory.

payload.description: New Metro-North route providing service from Penn Station to four new Bronx stations via Amtrak territory. Includes procurement of coach cars and dual-mode B+AC locomotives for rolling stock.

tool_args.label: Siemens B+AC Dual-Mode Locomotive Option
tool_args.raw_text: Modification to contract with Siemens Mobility, Inc. for design, manufacture, test, and delivery of 13 Dual-Mode B+AC Locomotives (Option 4) in the amount of $304,941,000.

payload.description: Exercise of Option 4 to contract with Siemens for 13 B+AC Dual-Mode Locomotives for Penn Station Access rolling stock, with option to purchase 2 additional.

tool_args.label: Coach Car RFP (Penn Station Access)
tool_args.raw_text: Competitive RFP for procurement of coach cars for operation on the new Penn Station Access route. Includes design, manufacture, test, and delivery of new coach cars.

payload.project_name: Coach Car Procurement for Penn Station Access
payload.description: Request for Proposals to solicit and evaluate proposals from railcar manufacturers for procurement of coach cars operating on the PSA route. Replaces End-Door and Center-Door coaches.

tool_args.label: Total Procurement Amount
tool_args.raw_text: The Procurement Agenda this month includes 2 actions for a proposed estimated expenditure of $304.9M.

payload.raw_value_text: 2 actions for a proposed estimated expenditure of $304.9M
payload.description: Total value of two procurement actions in the February 2025 Metro-North Procurement agenda

tool_args.label: Siemens Dual-Mode Locomotive Option Amount
tool_args.raw_text: Schedule I: Modification to Purchase and Public Works Contracts - $304,941,000 for 13 Dual-Mode Locomotives.

payload.scope: Option 4 exercise for 13 Dual-MMode B+AC Locomotives with option for 2 additional
payload.description: Amount of the option exercise for 13 B+AC dual-mode locomotives

tool_args.label: Original Contract Amount
tool_args.raw_text: Original Amount: $253,740,796. Current Amount: $785,993,274.

payload.scope: Siemens contract #244941 for design, manufacture, test, and delivery of new Dual-Mode Locomotives

tool_args.label: Zero-emission locomotive fleet
tool_args.raw_text: The B+AC configuration replaces the Diesel Engine with Traction Batteries as the locomotive prime mover and replaces the third-rail equipment with an AC Pantograph for operation under catenary. This furthers Metro-North's initiative in supporting the MTA's mission to reduce its carbon emissions footprint with the purchase of a zero-emission locomotive fleet.

payload.claim_text: The B+AC configuration replaces the Diesel Engine with Traction Batteries as the locomotive prime mover and replaces the third-rail equipment with an AC Pantograph for operation under catenary — a zero-emission locomotive fleet.
payload.description: B+AC locomotives are zero-emission, replacing diesel with battery traction as prime mover.

tool_args.label: Savings from fixed pricing
tool_args.raw_text: The agreed-to fixed price was based on a review of both historical and projected escalation. This approach provides a favorable price, price certainty, and a potential savings of approximately $12 million compared to projections of the escalated pricing. Additionally, savings of approximately $5 million were achieved from Siemens' initial proposal to their final.

payload.claim_text: The agreed-to fixed price provides a potential savings of approximately $12 million compared to projections of the escalated pricing. Additionally, savings of approximately $5 million were achieved from Siemens' initial proposal to their final.

tool_args.label: Fair and reasonable pricing
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Cost/Price determined that the overall aspects of the pricing for the Dual-Mode (Diesel-Electric) original design, including base costs and modifications, are fair and reasonable.

payload.claim_text: MTA Cost/Price determined that the overall aspects of the pricing for the Dual-Mode (Diesel-Electric) original design, including base costs and modifications, are fair and reasonable.

tool_args.raw_text: Board Action Order: 1 Committee 2/24/25, 2 Board 2/26/25

payload.description: NYC Transit Committee meeting to review procurement actions

tool_args.label: MTA Board Meeting
tool_args.raw_text: Board Action Order: 2 Board 2/26/25

payload.description: MTA Board meeting to approve procurement actions

tool_args.label: Document Date
tool_args.raw_text: February 21, 2025 - Document approval date

payload.description: Date of the procurement document preparation/approval

tool_args.label: Original SC-42 DM Locomotive Order
tool_args.raw_text: In December 2020, the MTA Board approved Metro-North's request to purchase 27 SC-42 Dual-Mode locomotives.

payload.description: MTA Board approved Metro-North's purchase of 27 SC-42 Dual-Mode locomotives (base 19 + Option 1 of 8)

tool_args.label: Base and Option 1 Execution
tool_args.raw_text: In March 2021, both the base and Option 1 were executed.

payload.description: Execution of base and Option 1 for 27 SC-42 Dual-Mode locomotives

tool_args.label: Option 2 Exercise - CTDOT
tool_args.raw_text: At the June 2023 Board, Metro-North, on behalf of CTDOT, exercised Option 2 for the purchase of six locomotives.

payload.description: Metro-North on behalf of CTDOT exercised Option 2 for purchase of 6 locomotives

tool_args.label: LIRR Option 3 Approval
tool_args.raw_text: Under Option 3, LIRR received approval at the December 2024 Board to purchase up to 44 alternate configuration dual-mode locomotives. In February 2025, LIRR executed Option 3 for 22 locomotives.

payload.description: LIRR received approval to purchase up to 44 alternate configuration dual-mode locomotives under Option 3

tool_args.label: LIRR Option 3 Execution
tool_args.raw_text: In February 2025, LIRR executed Option 3 for 22 locomotives.

payload.description: LIRR executed Option 3 for 22 dual-mode locomotives

tool_args.label: First Two Locomotives Delivered
tool_args.raw_text: To date, the first two Siemens locomotives from the base have been delivered on schedule to Metro-North and are undergoing acceptance testing.

payload.description: First two Siemens SC-42 dual-mode locomotives from the base order delivered on schedule to Metro-North and undergoing acceptance testing.

tool_args.label: B+AC Locomotive Delivery Schedule
tool_args.raw_text: The locomotives are scheduled to be delivered on property from January 2029 through July 2030.

payload.description: Delivery schedule for 13 B+AC locomotives from January 2029 through July 2030

tool_args.label: Siemens Completes 33 Locomotive Delivery
tool_args.raw_text: For the 33 locomotives in total, Siemens is scheduled to complete delivery in the third quarter of 2027.

payload.description: Siemens scheduled to complete delivery of 33 SC-42 DM locomotives in Q3 2027

tool_args.label: Pilot Locomotive Acceptance
tool_args.raw_text: The contract includes an option for the purchase of apparatus, such as specialized test equipment and tools... may be exercised prior to acceptance of pilot locomotives (June 2029).

payload.description: Pilot locomotive acceptance date for exercising apparatus purchase option

tool_args.label: Siemens Completes 33 Locomotive Delivery

tool_args.raw_text: Funding is anticipated to be provided by the 2020-2024 Capital Plan. / Funding for the locomotives is available in the 2020-2024 Capital Plan.
